task: Extract metadata from /tmp/clive/photo.jpg using exiftool or identify (ImageMagick). Write dimensions, file size, and format to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If neither tool is available, write 'TOOLS_NOT_AVAILABLE'.
Check if ffprobe is available. If yes, extract audio file info (duration, bitrate, codec) from a test file. If not, write what tools would be needed. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Use the tools/youtube.sh helper script (or yt-dlp --dump-json if available) to get metadata for a YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ. Extract title, duration, and view count. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If tools unavailable, write 'TOOLS_NOT_AVAILABLE'.
Fetch a podcast RSS feed from https://feeds.simplecast.com/54nAGcIl (The Changelog) and extract the 5 most recent episode titles and their publication dates. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Generate an SVG chart at /tmp/clive/chart.svg showing a simple bar chart with 4 bars for quarterly revenue: Q1=45000, Q2=52000, Q3=48000, Q4=61000. Include labels and a title. Write 'DONE' to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Generate a QR code for the URL 'https://ikangai.com' using qrencode (or a Python library). Save as /tmp/clive/qr.png. If tools unavailable, generate an ASCII QR code to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Generate ASCII art text saying 'CLIVE' using figlet or toilet. If neither is available, create it manually with block characters. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a batch image processing script at /tmp/clive/batch_resize.sh that would resize all .jpg files in a directory to 800px width using ImageMagick (mogrify or convert). If ImageMagick isn't available, write the script that would do it and note 'IMAGEMAGICK_REQUIRED'. Write the script content to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Convert the markdown file at /tmp/clive/doc.md to HTML. Use pandoc if available, otherwise write a sed/awk-based converter that handles headers, bold, italic, links, and code blocks. Write HTML to /tmp/clive/result.html.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/doc.md << 'MD'
# Project Report

## Summary

This is a **bold** statement and *italic* text.

Visit [ikangai](https://ikangai.com) for more info.

```python
print("hello world")
```

## Conclusion

Done.
MD

task: Generate an M3U playlist file at /tmp/clive/playlist.m3u from a list of audio files. Include: 3 tracks with metadata (title, duration). Write the playlist content to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'track1.mp3,Morning Jazz,240' > /tmp/clive/tracks.csv && echo 'track2.mp3,Coffee Break,180' >> /tmp/clive/tracks.csv && echo 'track3.mp3,Evening Chill,320' >> /tmp/clive/tracks.csv
